'''Sakiya''', also known as '''Saki''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the ''[[Bootana Hutta]]'' region of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. It was the tropical and heavily industrialized [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==History==
Although located near the astrographic center of [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], the indigenous Sakiyans resisted any attempt at takeover by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="LoNH" /> Employing advanced [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] technology highly valued by the Hutts, the Sakiyans had meticulous evacuation plans that they constantly revised, allowing them to quickly transport people, resources, and supplies to safety, and allowing them to conduct hit-and-run attacks against the invaders until they withdrew. Their vigilance and mobility repulsed invasions from the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], and the Hutts.

Around the [[Time/Legends|time]] the [[Eternal Empire]] ruled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], several [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]] warehouses were burned to the ground in a brief [[Sakiya slave uprising|slave revolt]], leaving nothing but scorched ruins behind. The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] subsequently attempted to bring the [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyans]] back into line.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|A Revolting Development}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
